task_id.description: Canonical board-generated task id. Principals must not choose this value for new tasks.

client_request_id.description: Principal-owned request tracking id. Not a primary key.

idempotency_key.description: Principal-provided idempotency key used by the board to return an existing task_id for duplicate submissions.

legacy_task_id.description: Compatibility alias for imported tasks from pre-board-generated task id systems.
